textBox.richText: QUICK LIST of CHANGES (see the ChangeLog file in the distribution for a complete and detailed list) NEW FEATURES COMPILER added support for complex array expressions in rule qualifiers added a [foldli] higher-order primitive (see LRM p 49 and examples/working/foldli) global constants are now correctly interpreted when used as type size parameters. fixed a significant bug in the simulator and the SystemC backend which caused execution results to depend on the order in which the actions where listed in a rule RHS when an array was both read and written in this rule. CAPH LIBRARY added [stream_ops.cph] for operating on unstructured streams EXAMPLES added [fir13a] and [fir13b], mono and multi-actor implementations of 1x3 FIR on unstructured streams examples in [working] are now sorted by categories, with a short description (examples/working/Readme)
